title: Chopper Sees the Truth
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Caesar Clown. The central beat is chopper sees the truth.
scene: The scene focuses on chopper sees the truth, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Caesar Clown shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah!! Hang on a moment, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Me too...!! I'm gonna freeze to death...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: One with a camera! ...and a mirror!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They turned into coats!! With shoes even!!

summary: Chopper Sees the Truth. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
